title: An overview of the genomics of metabolic syndrome.
author: Taylor JY Kraja AT de las Fuentes L Stanfill AG Clark A Cashion A
content:
S-EPMC3594572 PMC3594572 An overview of the genomics of metabolic syndrome.

Purpose

This article provides a brief overview of the diagnostic criteria and genomic risk factors for the components of metabolic syndrome (MetS).
